deep_dive.title: Time-Varying Perturbations of Contractive Systems With an Application to Safe Stabilization
deep_dive.abstract: Perturbation theory for asymptotically stable systems has received sustained attention, leading to many criteria that preserve stability under uncertainty. A limitation of classical stability analysis, however, is that it is inherently equilibrium-dependent. Contractive systems, by contrast, are defined independently of any equilibrium and admit a rich set of robustness bounds. In this letter, we develop new time-varying perturbation conditions for contractive dynamics that preserve incremental exponential stability of the perturbed system and, in specific regimes, guarantee asymptotic convergence to solutions of the nominal dynamics. As an application, we propose a safety filter for steering a nominally contractive system to a desired equilibrium while avoiding an unsafe set, and we present an example illustrating advantages of the proposed method over existing approaches.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Proposes a safety filter for contractive systems under time-varying perturbations, achieving safe stabilization
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 针对时变扰动下的收缩系统提出安全滤波器，实现安全镇定
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 针对时变扰动下的收缩系统提出安全滤波器，实现安全镇定
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 针对时变扰动下的收缩系统提出安全滤波器，实现安全镇定
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: This paper develops time-varying perturbation conditions for contractive systems and applies them to design a safety filter that steers the system to a desired state while ensuring safety, without relying on RL or neural networks.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 经典稳定性分析依赖于平衡点，难以处理时变扰动下的安全保证。本文针对收缩系统提出新的时变扰动条件，保持系统的增量指数稳定性，并在此基础上设计安全滤波器，将系统驱动到期望状态同时保证安全。理论证明了扰动下的稳定性和收敛性，并通过安全滤波应用展示了方法的有效性。该滤波器为安全关键控制提供了新的鲁棒工具。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 经典稳定性分析依赖于平衡点，难以处理时变扰动下的安全保证。本文针对收缩系统提出新的时变扰动条件，保持系统的增量指数稳定性，并在此基础上设计安全滤波器，将系统驱动到期望状态同时保证安全。理论证明了扰动下的稳定性和收敛性，并通过安全滤波应用展示了方法的有效性。该滤波器为安全关键控制提供了新的鲁棒工具。

deep_dive.title: Constrained Lyapunov Stabilization based on Gauss Variational Equations: From Spacecraft Orbital Transfers to Rendezvous
deep_dive.abstract: Lyapunov feedback laws can be constructed for performing orbital transfer maneuvers based on Gauss Variational Equations, or GVEs, while satisfying specified state and control constraints. These state and control constraints are enforced using barrier functions and saturation, respectively, while the reference governor, employed as a convergence governor, is used to avoid getting stuck at spurious equilibria that may be created by barrier functions. In this article, these Lyapunov feedback laws are extended to rendezvous maneuvers where not only five orbital elements are matched to prescribed target values, but also the true anomaly matches its time dependent target value. The modification involves altering the commanded semi major axis with an outer loop feedback law, also designed using Lyapunov techniques. We illustrate the resulting safe closed loop rendezvous maneuvers in simulations for conventional thrust based propulsion and Lorentz force-based propulsion. In the latter case, only the current through the tether is controlled, subject to current limits, to accomplish prescribed orbital transfer and rendezvous maneuvers.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Barrier functions used to enforce state and control constraints for Lyapunov stabilization
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 使用势垒函数（Barrier Functions）强制执行状态和控制约束，用于Lyapunov稳定
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 使用势垒函数（Barrier Functions）强制执行状态和控制约束，用于Lyapunov稳定
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 使用势垒函数（Barrier Functions）强制执行状态和控制约束，用于Lyapunov稳定
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: This paper uses barrier functions within Lyapunov feedback laws for constrained spacecraft orbital transfers and rendezvous, demonstrating safe control via constraint satisfaction.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 该文针对航天器轨道转移和交会中的状态和控制约束问题，在Lyapunov反馈律中采用势垒函数和饱和处理来强制执行约束，并通过参考调速器避免虚假平衡，实现了安全约束下的轨道机动控制。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 该文针对航天器轨道转移和交会中的状态和控制约束问题，在Lyapunov反馈律中采用势垒函数和饱和处理来强制执行约束，并通过参考调速器避免虚假平衡，实现了安全约束下的轨道机动控制。

quick_skim.title: Koopman meets input-output data: Data-driven output-feedback control of nonlinear systems with closed-loop guarantees
quick_skim.abstract: Data-driven control of nonlinear systems from input-output measurements remains a fundamental challenge, as existing approaches with rigorous closed-loop guarantees predominantly require access to full state measurements. In this paper, we address this gap by proposing a data-driven output-feedback controller design method for nonlinear systems that provides provable closed-loop guarantees while operating solely on measured input-output data. Our approach combines Koopman operator theory with an extended state representation of the nonlinear system constructed from input-output trajectories. This allows us to obtain a bilinear surrogate model directly from data, on which robust state-feedback design methods can be applied. By exploiting the observability of the underlying nonlinear system, we establish exponential stability of the extended state, which in turn implies exponential convergence of the original system state to the origin. Finally, we validate our theoretical findings in numerical simulations.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: data-driven control with closed-loop guarantees, applicable to safe control
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 带闭环保证的数据驱动控制，可应用于安全控制
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 带闭环保证的数据驱动控制，可应用于安全控制
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 带闭环保证的数据驱动控制，可应用于安全控制
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes a data-driven output-feedback controller for nonlinear systems using Koopman theory, providing provable closed-loop guarantees from input-output data, enabling safe control without full state measurement.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 本文针对非线性系统数据驱动控制中需要全状态测量的局限，提出了一种仅依赖输入输出数据的输出反馈控制器设计方法。该方法结合Koopman算子理论与扩展状态表示，构建双线性代理模型，并在此基础上设计鲁棒状态反馈控制器，提供可证明的闭环保证。实验验证了其在无全状态信息下的安全控制能力，为安全关键系统提供了数据驱动的控制方案。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 本文针对非线性系统数据驱动控制中需要全状态测量的局限，提出了一种仅依赖输入输出数据的输出反馈控制器设计方法。该方法结合Koopman算子理论与扩展状态表示，构建双线性代理模型，并在此基础上设计鲁棒状态反馈控制器，提供可证明的闭环保证。实验验证了其在无全状态信息下的安全控制能力，为安全关键系统提供了数据驱动的控制方案。
